title: The God
description: He watches you, he knows everything about you, he's good to you until you make too many mistakes
body:
![  ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae0388a03f6d6b52b7b3dea854dd2f67ce7ca91.png)

~~You should have been kinder~~

We've launched a Discord server! Join us! https://discord.gg/NE6fdKPXFG

_(The mod is in an early version, also added the ability to turn on and off the karma indicator with the command /karmabartrue or /karmabarfalse)_

**Since version 1.1.1 geckolib is required**

Imagine a new horror mod for Minecraft that adds a powerful creature watching you from the sky. It sees everything you do, every choice you make. But there’s no need to be scared — as long as you’re good, it won’t harm you. It just watches quietly from above, and if you keep doing the right thing, it might even reward you with something special.

**But be careful: one bad decision, and that distant figure in the sky could become your worst nightmare...**

_This is my first mod, if you find bugs then write in the comments._

The mod itself includes 24 events, and the god is invulnerable, and if your karma will be too small, you can not escape for you will lose the right to life

If the mod gains enough downloads, I will continue its development and improvement

ideas and sound were taken from the game Squirrel Stapler


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

In this mod, your karma depends on your actions. You can earn karma by killing hostile mobs, but it’s not that simple. Atoning for your sins is much harder than committing them. For every hostile mob you defeat, you’ll gain 1 karma point. But be warned: if you kill something that isn’t hostile, you’ll lose anywhere from 1 to 15 karma points, depending on the creature.

~~Every choice matters. Will you rise as a hero or fall into darkness? The creature in the sky is always watching...~~

</details>
